title: Secure Heavy Furniture
content: Anchor top-heavy furniture, tall bookcases, and appliances to wall studs using brackets.

title: Prepare Emergency Kit
content: Pack a 3-day supply of non-perishable food, water (3 liters/person/day), flashlight, and first-aid supplies.

title: Identify Safe Spots
content: Locate sturdy tables or interior walls away from glass windows and heavy hanging objects.

title: Drop, Cover, and Hold On
content: DROP to hands and knees. COVER head and neck under a sturdy table. HOLD ON until shaking stops.

title: Stay Indoors in High-Rises
content: Do not run outside or use elevators during shaking. Stay away from windows and exterior walls in Dhaka.

title: If Outdoors, Move to Open Space
content: Move away from buildings, streetlights, electric wires, and narrow alleyways.

title: Check for Injuries
content: Provide basic first aid. Do not move seriously injured people unless they are in immediate danger.

title: Inspect Gas and Electrical Lines
content: If you smell gas or hear a hissing noise, open windows and turn off the main gas valve immediately.

title: Head to Safe Assembly Grounds
content: Evacuate using stairs. Proceed calmly to designated open fields or parks near your area.

title: Expect Aftershocks
content: Be prepared for secondary tremors. Follow safety instructions from official broadcasting channels.
